Fernando Gavi?la was an actor active in Mexico City in the 1790's and early 1800's, who also wrote at least one other play, "La lealtad americana, drama heroyco en un acto" (1796). Both he and Dolores Mungui?a are listed in the credits of this zarzuela; Sen?ora Mungui?a played the title role.
dc_title: La linda poblana: zarzuela en dos actos
dc_title:alternative: The pretty woman from Puebla: a zarzuela in two acts

Fernando Gavi?la was an actor active in Mexico City in the 1790's and early 1800's, who also wrote at least one other play, "La lealtad americana, drama heroyco en un acto" (1796). Both he and Dolores Mungui?a are listed in the credits of this zarzuela; Sen?ora Mungui?a played the title role.
dc_title: La linda poblana: zarzuela en dos actos
dc_title:alternative: The pretty woman from Puebla: a zarzuela in two acts
